name: 1Password Item
description: Represents a complete 1Password item stored in a vault, including its fields, sections, URLs, tags, and associated metadata. Items are the primary unit of secret storage in 1Password.

id.description: The unique identifier for the item.

title.description: The title of the item displayed in the 1Password interface.

category.description: The category that determines the item template and available fields.

urls.description: URLs associated with the item, such as website login pages.

favorite.description: Whether the item is marked as a favorite.

tags.description: Tags applied to the item for organization.

version.description: The version number of the item, incremented on each update.

state.description: The current state of the item.

fields.description: The fields of the item containing secrets and metadata values.

sections.description: Sections used to organize fields into logical groups within the item.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time the item was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time the item was last updated.

lastEditedBy.description: The UUID of the user who last edited the item.

VaultRef.description: A reference to a 1Password vault by its unique identifier.

id.description: The unique identifier of the vault.

VaultRef.name: VaultRef

Url.description: A URL associated with an item.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary URL for the item.

Url.name: Url

Field.description: A field within an item that stores a single value such as a username, password, or other data.

id.description: The unique identifier for the field.

section.description: Reference to the section this field belongs to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the section.

type.description: The data type of the field.

purpose.description: The purpose of the field indicating its role within the item.

label.description: The human-readable label for the field.

value.description: The value stored in the field.

generate.description: Whether the field value should be auto-generated.

entropy.description: The entropy (strength) of the generated value in bits.

Field.name: Field

GeneratorRecipe.description: Configuration for generating a random value for a field.

length.description: The length of the generated value.

characterSets.description: The character sets to include when generating the value.

excludeCharacters.description: Characters to exclude from the generated value.

GeneratorRecipe.name: GeneratorRecipe

Section.description: A section within an item used to organize fields into logical groups.

id.description: The unique identifier for the section.

label.description: The human-readable label for the section.

Section.name: Section
